name: Maple Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 15 oz package of refrigerated pie crusts (such as Pillsbury)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare the pie crust according to package instructions and place it in a pie dish.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the pumpkin puree, maple syrup, eggs, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped pecans until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
6. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
